sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6732" key="a)na/klima" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνάκλῐμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n6732.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">slope, ascent,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τῆς γῆς</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1165.tlg001:173:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apollod.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Poliorc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">173.11</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
